title: YTPMV: MrRoboto113's 1000th Subscriber Spectacular
description:
mp3 http://www.mediafire.com/?bcyrau4sxz4
To celebrate my 1000th subscriber, I made this, Everyone Favors A Techno Beat, a music video spanning all the sources that made me popular.

My thanks to all my subscribers! Can't wait until I hit 2000!

No, there are no Weegees hidden or anything like that.
